Live Music for Private Events & Gigs

Pip & the
Bad Seed

A two-piece cover band that turns any room into a proper night out. Weddings, corporate events, private parties — we bring the fire.

Book a Gig
Scroll

Who We Are

Two people.
One hell
of a show.

Pip and the Bad Seed is a dynamic duo cover band built for private events and live gigs. We take the songs you love and play them with the energy they deserve — no filler, no backing tracks, no nonsense.

From intimate dinner parties to packed wedding receptions, we read the room and deliver exactly what the moment needs. Whether you want background ambiance or a full-on dancefloor, we've got the set for it.

Raw.
Real. Live.

What We Play

The Repertoire

Decades of hits, expertly stripped back and reimagined for two. We cover everything — just ask.

01
Rock & Indie
From Arctic Monkeys to The Killers — anthems that get people singing.
02
Pop Classics
Floor-fillers across the decades. Everyone knows the words.
03
Soul & Motown
Timeless grooves that work for any crowd, any age, any occasion.
04
80s & 90s Hits
The stuff that gets the older crowd back on the dancefloor fast.
05
Background Sets
Acoustic and easy-listening for dinners, receptions, and quiet hours.
06
Your Requests
Got a special song? Send us your wishlist — we'll learn it.
